nodes.name: Mon-Fri 8am, 12pm, 6pm
nodes.notes: Runs 3x/day on weekdays. Julian gets pipeline status before team sees it.

nodes.name: Fetch Julian reminders
nodes.notes: Reminders filtered by Julian's user_id. Only his applications and claimed companies.

nodes.name: Fetch new discovery candidates
nodes.notes: Gets all pending candidates. Julian filters by ML/AI profile keywords.

nodes.name: Format JARVIS personal alert
nodes.notes: Full matching config: target keywords, exclude keywords, stack scoring, Oracle deadline awareness, min score 65.

nodes.name: Only notify if actionable
nodes.notes: Skips Telegram if nothing new. Avoids notification spam.

nodes.name: Send to Julian via JARVIS bot
nodes.notes: Calls Telegram Bot API directly using JARVIS_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID from .env. No credential setup needed in n8n UI — plug and play.

main.node: Send to Julian via JARVIS bot

meta.description: Personal pipeline alerts for Julian via JARVIS Telegram bot. Filters ML/AI candidates matching his profile. Runs 3x/day on weekdays. NOT the team digest — this is Julian's private edge.
